{{Infobox artifact
| name = Benson's steel
| introduced = tg-01-house-of-blades
}}

''See also: [[Benson's steel Timeline]]''

== Overview ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Benson]]'s [[steel]], also referred to as [[Benson]]'s [[liquid steel]], is a powerful [[essence]] brewed by the skeleton known as [[Benson]]. It manifests as a cold, rushing force that flows through a user's veins like an icy river and can appear as chains stretching across the skin. When summoned, this power provides significant physical reinforcement, granting users increased strength, protection against pain and impact, and enhanced speed. It can also be used to deflect projectiles or facilitate dramatic movements, such as jumping great distances. Users can draw upon this power in varying amounts, sometimes calling it all at once to achieve a massive surge of strength, though doing so can lead to rapid exhaustion and physical weakness once the [[essence]] is depleted. The [[steel]] is deeply connected to [[Benson]] himself; those who use it can sometimes experience mental visions of the skeleton sitting upon his throne in his blue-lit basement. While it provides immense utility, using the [[steel]] is a taxing process that can leave a person vulnerable once the power runs out.}}

== House of Blades ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Benson's steel]] is a resource used by [[Simon]] that can be depleted.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c11">''House of Blades'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Simon]] used [[Benson]]'s [[liquid steel]] to power his legs.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c12">''House of Blades'', chapter 12</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Benson's steel]] flows through [[Simon]].<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c15">''House of Blades'', chapter 15</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-01-house-of-blades|[[Benson's steel]] protected [[Simon]] from the impact against the wall.<ref name="tg-01-house-of-blades-c18">''House of Blades'', chapter 18</ref>}}

== The Crimson Vault ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Indirial]] is powered by [[Benson's steel]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c1">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 1</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Benson]]’s [[steel]] is something [[Kai]] holds to protect his throat.<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c4">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 4</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-02-crimson-vault|[[Simon]] can release [[Benson's steel]].<ref name="tg-02-crimson-vault-c9">''The Crimson Vault'', chapter 9</ref>}}

== City of Light ==
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Benson]]'s [[steel]] was among the powers [[Simon]] possessed during his initial meeting with [[Valin]]. While [[Simon]] has utilized this ability to brace himself against walls, the sensation of the power is described as flowing through the veins like an icy river. [[Simon]] is also capable of pushing with the strength of [[Benson]]'s [[steel]]. Beyond [[Simon]], the power can be summoned by [[Indirial]] and has also been used by [[Kai]].}}

{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Benson's steel]] is one of the powers [[Simon]] held when he first met [[Valin]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c3">''City of Light'', chapter 3</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Benson's steel]] is something [[Simon]] uses to brace himself against walls.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c10">''City of Light'', chapter 10</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Benson's steel]] flows through the veins like an icy river.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c11">''City of Light'', chapter 11</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Simon]] can push with [[Benson's steel]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c13">''City of Light'', chapter 13</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Benson's steel]] is something [[Indirial]] can summon.<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c17">''City of Light'', chapter 17</ref>}}
{{spoiler|book=tg-03-city-of-light|[[Kai]] uses [[Benson's steel]].<ref name="tg-03-city-of-light-c21">''City of Light'', chapter 21</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Artifacts]]
[[Category:House of Blades]]
[[Category:The Crimson Vault]]
[[Category:City of Light]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate]]
[[Category:Traveler's Gate artifacts]]
